title: syringa villosa subsp. villosa
intro: Syringa villosa subsp. villosa, also known as the hairy lilac or common lilac, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Syringa villosa subsp. villosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
